landing.subtitle: Upload an EPUB and get AI summaries for every chapter in seconds. Save time, retain more, and never lose track of where you left off.

features.title: Chapter-by-Chapter Summaries
features.description: Get concise AI-generated summaries for every chapter of your book — no more skimming.

features.description: Upload your EPUB and summaries start generating right away, chapter by chapter.

features.title: Personal Library
features.description: All your books in one place. Revisit summaries anytime without re-uploading.

features.title: Slide Viewer
features.description: Browse each chapter summary as a clean, readable slide — perfect for quick review.
